Platfrmr Boilerplate 2.0 is here

Ship your SaaS in days, not months.

The ultimate Next.js boilerplate with everything you need to build, launch, and scale your SaaS product. Authentication, billing, dashboards, and more—all out of the box.

Get StartedExplore Features →

Everything you need

Focus on your product, we've got the rest

Don't reinvent the wheel. Platfrmr provides a rock-solid foundation so you can spend your time building features your users actually care about.

Authentication

Secure, passwordless login and OAuth integration out of the box.

Billing & Subscriptions

Flexible pricing models powered by Stripe with built-in customer portals.

Team Workspaces

Multi-tenant architecture allowing users to collaborate in isolated environments.

Analytics Ready

Built-in tracking and analytics to measure product adoption from day one.

Performance First

Optimized for speed with Edge network delivery and modern React patterns.

Enterprise Security

Bank-grade security, RBAC, and data compliance standards built-in.

Ready to launch your SaaS?

Join hundreds of founders who are shipping faster and smarter. Start building your next big idea today.
